name: ger40_donchian_trend_breakout_m15
hypothesis: GER40 M15 exhibits persistent intraday trend continuation during European cash session (07:00-15:30 UTC); 20-bar Donchian breakouts filtered by ADX>22 and rising ATR percentile capture trend legs with positive expectancy.

entry_rules.long: Close > Donchian-20 high of prior bar AND EMA50 > EMA200 AND ADX(14) > 22 AND session active; one entry per breakout level.
entry_rules.short: Close < Donchian-20 low of prior bar AND EMA50 < EMA200 AND ADX(14) > 22 AND session active.

exit_rules.stop_loss: 2.0 * ATR(14) from entry or opposite Donchian band, whichever closer
exit_rules.time_stop: close at 16:00 UTC if unfilled TP; force-close any open trade at 20:00 UTC

falsifiable_conditions: Reject if PF<2.0, Sharpe<1.5, or if low-ADX subset outperforms high-ADX subset (thesis inversion), or trades<200.
notes: Distinct from Pine DAX10 prior (that was MACD/RSI momentum with PineConnector plumbing); this is pure Donchian-trend.
